props.ChoiceText: You worked before an audience hungry for humiliation, and the night denied them moderation.
props.ChoiceBio: A ritual under witness taught you that spectators mostly come prepared to believe whatever humiliates someone usefully.

0.TransitionText: Because a ritual under witness taught you how useful humiliation can be, occult work began to overlap with reputation.
0.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Courtier, but you may remain on your current path instead.

1.TransitionText: Because a ritual under witness taught you that spectators mostly come prepared to believe whatever humiliates someone usefully, public scrutiny only made the occult more compelling.
1.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Occultist, but you may remain on your current path instead.

2.TransitionText: Because a ritual under witness taught you that spectators mostly come prepared to believe whatever humiliates someone usefully, ritual and doctrine began to converge in your mind.
2.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Religious, but you may remain on your current path instead.
